subcodes.first_line: Verily, from My Most Exalted Pen I make mention of him who hath been named Muhammad in the Kingdom of creation, and whom We did aforetime remember as a bounty [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: انا نذکر من قلمی الاعلی من سمی بمحمد فی ملکوت الانشاء و ذکرناه من قبل فضلا
subcodes.subjects: @suffering and imprisonment, @tests and trials; sacrifice and suffering, @praise and encouragement
